parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the peripheral configuration structure.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_PWM_Type *p_reg, uint32_t mask, uint8_t irq_priority, bool enable)
memberdef.name: nrfy_pwm_int_init

briefdescription.para: Function for initializing the specified PWM interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be initialized.
Interrupt priority.
True if interrupts are to be enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for uninitializing the PWM interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for processing the specified PWM events.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of events to be processed, created by NRFY_EVENT_TO_INT_BITMASK.

simplesect.para: Mask of events that were generated and processed. To be checked against the result of NRFY_EVENT_TO_INT_BITMASK().

briefdescription.para: Function for starting the PWM sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Sequence index.
True if the sequence is to be blocking, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Function for aborting the ongoing PWM sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
True if the abort is to be blocking, false otherwise.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_task_trigger Function for activating the specified PWM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_task_address_get Function for getting the address of the specified PWM task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PWM task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.
nrf_pwm_event_clear Function for clearing the specified PWM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_event_check Function for retrieving the state of the PWM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_event_address_get Function for getting the address of the specified PWM event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PWM event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.
nrf_pwm_shorts_enable Function for enabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of shortcuts to be enabled.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_shorts_disable Function for disabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of shortcuts to be disabled.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_shorts_set Function for setting the configuration of PWM shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts configuration to be set.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_int_enable Function for enabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_pwm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_int_disable Function for disabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_pwm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_int_set Function for setting the configuration of PWM interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be set. Use nrf_pwm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_int_enable_check Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_pwm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.
nrf_pwm_subscribe_set Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given PWM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_subscribe_clear Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given PWM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_publish_set Function for setting the publish configuration for a given PWM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_publish_clear Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given PWM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_enable Function for enabling the PWM peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_disable Function for disabling the PWM peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_enable_check Function for checking if the PWM peripheral is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The PWM is enabled.
The PWM is not enabled.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_pins_set Function for assigning pins to PWM output channels.

detaileddescription.para: Usage of all PWM output channels is optional. If a given channel is not needed, pass the NRF_PWM_PIN_NOT_CONNECTED value instead of its pin number.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Array with pin numbers for individual PWM output channels.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_pin_get Function for getting pin selection associated with specified PWM output channel.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
PWM output channel.

simplesect.para: Pin selection associated with specified PWM output channel.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_PWM_Type *p_reg, nrf_pwm_clk_t base_clock, nrf_pwm_mode_t mode, uint16_t top_value)
memberdef.name: nrfy_pwm_configure

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_configure Function for configuring the PWM peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Base clock frequency.
Operating mode of the pulse generator counter.
Value up to which the pulse generator counter counts.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_sequence_set Function for defining a sequence of PWM duty cycles.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Identifier of the sequence (0 or 1).
Pointer to the sequence definition.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_decoder_set Function for setting the mode of loading sequence data from RAM and advancing the sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mode of loading sequence data from RAM.
Mode of advancing the active sequence.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_loop_set Function for setting the number of times the sequence playback should be performed.

detaileddescription.para: This function applies to two-sequence playback (concatenated sequence 0 and 1). A single sequence can be played back only once.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Number of times to perform the sequence playback.

simplesect.para: nrf_pwm_seqstart_task_get Function for getting the specified PWM SEQSTART task.

parameterdescription.para: Sequence index.

simplesect.para: The specified PWM SEQSTART task.
nrf_pwm_seqend_event_get Function for getting the specified PWM SEQEND event.

parameterdescription.para: Sequence index.

simplesect.para: The specified PWM SEQEND event.

briefdescription.para: Hardware access layer with cache and barrier support for managing the PWM peripheral.

simplesect.para: Extended Hardware Access Layer (HALY) is deprecated.
